title: Interdimensional
description: A fabric mod for creating and managing custom dimensions and portals
body:
## Dimensions

Interdimensional allows you to create custom dimensions from an intuitive command interface, without needing to install the mod on your client!


## Portals

There is additonal functionality for creating server-side custom portals using the portal command.


## Commands

All Interdimensional commands are prefixed with `/dim`

A more in depth use guide is available on the [Interdimensional Wiki](https://quiltservertools.github.io/Interdimensional)


## Showcase

Here are a few screenshots showing the things you can do with Interdimensional

![Screenshot1](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/832348385997619300/881844287233491024/unknown.png "")
![Screenshot2](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/849775783907295254/877748595502223360/unknown.png "")
![Screenshot3](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/815172355562143754/869307294695968818/unknown.png "")


## Libraries used

Interdimensional makes use of the following libraries:

[Fantasy](https://github.com/nucleoidmc/fantasy) by NucleoidMC

[Polymer](https://github.com/patbox/polymer) by Patbox

Our portals implementation is also a very heavily modified version of the [Custom Portal API](https://github.com/kyrptonaught/customportalapi)


## Dependencies

Interdimensional requires Fabric Language Kotlin and Fabric API
